hero.label: Stay connected
hero.title: Join the Conversation
hero.tagline: One connected chat, choose any platform.
hero.lead: Our group chats are superbridged. Join on whichever platform you already use, and your messages reach everyone on all the others. No need to be in multiple groups.

subscribe.title: Newsletter
subscribe.lead:
Once a month, we round up the latest local events, new open model releases, and community news.
All focused on running AI on your own hardware, nothing else.
subscribe.checkboxLabel: Notify me when new platforms are added
